mapper.html:
Welcome, {{253.`Company name`}}

Hi {{254.`Partner first name`}},


We’re thrilled to work with {{253.`Company name`}} and look forward to growing your business! Do you want to get to know us better? Find some of our best performances, way of work, and team through this page.

First things first, to get going we need you to help us fix the essentials 

Sign our data processing agreement

This enables us to analyze processes and use your data. Requirement!

Fill out the pre-audit questionnaire

The answers are needed to create a good picture of your organisation and needs.

Share all important documents in this folder

Share your experiences, exchange ideas, and build meaningful connections.

Grant access to all relevant channels

Stay connected with us through our newsletter and social media channels

Contract signed

Onboarding

Growth audit

Strategy setting

Your growth strategist will contact you to schedule a first acquaintance meeting. If you have any questions in the meantime, do not hesitate to get in touch or to directly reply to this mail.


Best,

Sharif Sediqui

Head of growth operations

Follow us on

Instagram

Linkedin

Tiktok

Sprints & Sneakers HQ, Duivendrechtsekade 80b, 1096 AH,  Amsterdam, 

020 244 3755

Welcome, {{253.`Company name`}}

Hi {{254.`Partner first name`}},


We’re thrilled to work with {{253.`Company name`}} and look forward to growing your business! Do you want to get to know us better? Find some of our best performances, way of work, and team through this page.

First things first, to get going we need you to help us fix the essentials 

Sign our data processing agreement

This enables us to analyze processes and use your data. Requirement!

Fill out the pre-audit questionnaire

The answers are needed to create a good picture of your organisation and needs.

Share all important documents in this folder

Share your experiences, exchange ideas, and build meaningful connections.

Grant access to all relevant channels

Stay connected with us through our newsletter and social media channels

Contract signed

Onboarding

Growth audit

Strategy setting

Your growth strategist will contact you to schedule a first acquaintance meeting. If you have any questions in the meantime, do not hesitate to get in touch or to directly reply to this mail.


Best,

Sharif Sediqui

Head of growth operations

Instagram

Linkedin

Tiktok

mapper.html:
Hi {{254.`Partner first name`}},


Heel gaaf dat we gaan samenwerken. We hebben al het vertrouwen dat we er samen een succes van gaan maken met de wervingscampagnes. 


Meer weten over onze werkwijze? Bekijk dan nog eens deze pagina.

Om de campagne zo snel mogelijk live te krijgen, hebben we jullie hulp nodig voor onderstaande items - Kunnen jullie deze zsm afronden? Zonder dit kunnen we niet aan de slag.

Tekenen van de dataverwerkingsovereenkomst

Dit stelt ons in staat om persoonsgegevens te verwerken en de campagne op te zetten.

Invullen van de wervingscampagne checklist

Het complete functieprofiel in kaart voor een perfecte campagne.

Het delen van de content

Foto's van personeel, de locatie en sfeerbeelden. Daarnaast testimonials van 2-4 medewerkers inclusief foto & aanvullende materialen zoals video's of andere visuals.

Samenwerking gestart

Onboarding en voorbereiding

Campagne opleveren en doornemen

Campagne live

Neem contact op als er iets onduidelijk is, we beginnen graag zo snel mogelijk!


Vriendelijke groet,

Gino Boekelaar

Head of Talent hacking

Good life Jobs is onderdeel van

Follow us on

Instagram

Linkedin

Sprints & Sneakers HQ, Duivendrechtsekade 80b, 1096 AH,  Amsterdam,

Welcome, {{253.`Company name`}}

Hi {{254.`Partner first name`}},


We’re thrilled to work with {{253.`Company name`}} and look forward to growing your business! Do you want to get to know us better? Find some of our best performances, way of work, and team through this page.

First things first, to get going we need you to help us fix the essentials 

Sign our data processing agreement

This enables us to analyze processes and use your data. Requirement!

Fill out the pre-audit questionnaire

The answers are needed to create a good picture of your organisation and needs.

Share all important documents in this folder

Share your experiences, exchange ideas, and build meaningful connections.

Grant access to all relevant channels

Stay connected with us through our newsletter and social media channels

Contract signed

Onboarding

Growth audit

Strategy setting

Your growth strategist will contact you to schedule a first acquaintance meeting. If you have any questions in the meantime, do not hesitate to get in touch or to directly reply to this mail.


Best,

Sharif Sediqui

Head of growth operations

Follow us on

Instagram

Linkedin

Tiktok

Sprints & Sneakers HQ, Duivendrechtsekade 80b, 1096 AH,  Amsterdam, 

020 244 3755
